title: hieracium alatum subsp. nouletii
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. nouletii, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, Hieracium alatum subsp. nouletii is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions like wounds and eczema.
